name: ShipGhost PR Engine
description: Analyzes local git diffs, generates PR descriptions, conventional commit cleanup, AES-GCM-256 encryption, GPG clearsigning, APS KV PR history persistence, and R2 signed artifact upload.
_comment: Publish metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type) is read by `anna-app apps publish` / `anna-app executa publish`; dev fields (tool_id/type/enabled) are read by `anna-app dev`. Run `anna-app dev` from the app root to launch this executa locally.
